---
author: "Eliot McIntire"
date: last-modified
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
execute:
  tidy: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  error: false
---

# Fire under climate change {#sec-fire-under-climate-change}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is in progress. The narrative draws on the
fire-under-climate-change experiment infrastructure in
[`FireSenseTesting`](https://github.com/PredictiveEcology/FireSenseTesting),
which uses `experimentTmux()` (interactive) and `experimentSBATCH()`
(HPC) to run combinations of empirical land regions (`.ELFind`),
sampling ranges (`.samplingRange`, e.g. `1991:2020` for NRV vs.
`2071:2100` for future climate), GCMs, SSPs, and replicates.

A full draft is forthcoming. The mechanics from
@sec-experiments apply directly -- the chapter will fill in the
domain-specific `global.R` (pulling in LandR, FireSense, and
climateData modules via `setupProject()`), the FireSense status
calculator, and the upload-anti-join pipeline used to ship outputs
to Google Drive.
:::
